name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_ComprisedOf
title: R5: Types of medicinal manufactured items and/or devices that this product consists of, such as tablets, capsule, or syringes (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.comprisedOf` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.comprisedOf` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ManufacturedItemDefinition,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceDefinition)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.comprisedOf` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ManufacturedItemDefinition,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceDefinition)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.comprisedOf` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.comprisedOf` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Types of medicinal manufactured items and/or devices that this product consists of, such as tablets, capsule, or syringes (new)

element.short: Types of medicinal manufactured items and/or devices that this product consists of, such as tablets, capsule, or syringes
element.definition: Types of medicinal manufactured items and/or devices that this product consists of, such as tablets, capsule, or syringes. Used as a direct link when the item's packaging is not being recorded (see also PackagedProductDefinition.package.containedItem.item).
